channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:
1. Highguard Breaks Silence With Surprise Update And Teases A New Mode That Focuses On What The Game Does Best  Kotaku
  2. Wildlight Reveals First Highguard Content Update Since Layoffs  TechPowerUp
  3. "We were turned into a joke from minute one" - fired Highguard developer reflects on game's ill-fated launch and "false assumptions" after Game Awards reveal  Eurogamer
  4. Highguard Dev Breaks Silence After Website Shutdown – Promises More Updates  VICE
  5. UPDATE: Highguard Developer Wildlight Entertainment Confirms Layoffs At The Studio  Game Informer

item.title: Memory Crisis Threatening to Delay PS6 Could Last 'Another 10 Years' - Push Square
item.description:
1. Memory Crisis Threatening to Delay PS6 Could Last 'Another 10 Years'  Push Square
  2. PS6 Plans Reportedly Thrown Into Uncertainty By AI Hardware Demand  GameSpot
  3. What we know about PS6 (and what we don’t know)  Polygon
  4. Sony Reportedly Considering Pushing Back PS6 Release to 2028 or Even 2029 Amid AI-Fueled Chip Crisis  IGN
  5. Switch 2 pricing and next PlayStation release could be impacted by memory shortage  The Verge

item.title: Acer and ASUS take their Germany websites offline, customers locked out of official downloads - VideoCardz.com
item.description:
1. Acer and ASUS take their Germany websites offline, customers locked out of official downloads  VideoCardz.com
  2. Acer and Asus halt PC and laptop sales in Germany amid H.265 codec patent dispute — Nokia wins patent ruling, forcing tech giants to license HEVC codec  Tom's Hardware
  3. ASUS to Continue Support for PCs and Notebooks in Germany Despite Sales Ban  TechPowerUp
  4. It's just become harder to update drivers and bios in Germany as Acer and Asus' websites are down  PC Gamer
  5. Acer and Asus have stopped support for laptops in German patent dispute described as a 'tire fire of monstrous proportions'  TechRadar

item.title: Pokémon Pokopia Sped Through Development Thanks To Some Good Old Collaboration - Nintendo Life
item.description:
1. Pokémon Pokopia Sped Through Development Thanks To Some Good Old Collaboration  Nintendo Life
  2. What is Pokopia? Inside the calming Pokémon game that ditches battles for gardening  The Guardian
  3. All Confirmed Pokemon in Pokopia  IGN
  4. Pokopia: Game Freak on how Ruby and Sapphire inspired Pokémon’s biggest ever spin-off  Video Games Chronicle
  5. All Pokémon Pokopia Pre-Order Bonuses & Prices, Explained  Insider Gaming

item.title: iOS 27 will bring Liquid Glass changes, and I’m excited for one reason - 9to5Mac
item.description:
1. iOS 27 will bring Liquid Glass changes, and I’m excited for one reason  9to5Mac
  2. iOS 27 'Rave' Update to Clean Up Code, Could Boost Battery Life  MacRumors
  3. Is Apple About to Fix the Long-Running iPhone Battery Drain Issues With iOS 27?  The Mac Observer
  4. Apple iOS 27 update explained: Eligible iPhones, expected features, release date and more  The Financial Express
  5. Apple Wants iOS 27 To Boost Battery Life—Why Users Are Skeptical  Newsweek
